query:
INSERT INTO tournaments (name, slug, isGlobal, status, country, season, startDate, endDate, createdBy)
VALUES (
  'Copa do Mundo FIFA',
  'copa-do-mundo-fifa-2026',
  1,
  'active',
  'WORLD',
  '2026',
  '2026-06-11 00:00:00',
  '2026-07-19 00:00:00',
  1
);

SET @tid = LAST_INSERT_ID();

-- Fases do torneio
INSERT INTO tournament_phases (tournamentId, `key`, label, enabled, `order`, slots, isKnockout) VALUES
(@tid, 'group_a',    'Grupo A',       1, 1,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_b',    'Grupo B',       1, 2,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_c',    'Grupo C',       1, 3,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_d',    'Grupo D',       1, 4,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_e',    'Grupo E',       1, 5,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_f',    'Grupo F',       1, 6,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_g',    'Grupo G',       1, 7,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_h',    'Grupo H',       1, 8,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_i',    'Grupo I',       1, 9,  4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_j',    'Grupo J',       1, 10, 4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_k',    'Grupo K',       1, 11, 4, 0),
(@tid, 'group_l',    'Grupo L',       1, 12, 4, 0),
(@tid, 'round_of_32','Oitavas de Final', 1, 13, 32, 1),
(@tid, 'round_of_16','Quartas de Final', 1, 14, 16, 1),
(@tid, 'semifinals', 'Semifinais',    1, 15, 8,  1),
(@tid, 'third_place','Disputa 3º Lugar', 1, 16, 2, 1),
(@tid, 'final',      'Final',         1, 17, 2,  1);
